$comment: ★ ★ ★ v2.0 SDLC 4단계 chain harness 통합 SSOT (master plan §B 정합). DEC-2026-05-06-v2.0-i-strict-채택 + DEC-2026-05-06-round-trip-부분-허용 + DEC-2026-05-06-cooling-off-정책-폐기 + DEC-2026-05-06-harness-호칭-엄밀화 정합. analysis stage = sub_flow (analysis.phase-flow.json 흡수). chain 1~4 stage 별 sub_flow + 4 gate + revisit_edges + cross_cutting validators. drift-validator phase-flow 비교기 자동 검증 대상. ★ ★ ★ harness_status 필드 = 호칭 엄밀화 (DEC-2026-05-06-harness-호칭-엄밀화 정합) — scaffolding / harness-incomplete / harness-complete enum.

harness_status_meta.$comment: DEC-2026-05-06-harness-호칭-엄밀화 정합. enum: 'scaffolding' (sub-plan-1~4 종결 / 사양 + validator + skills) | 'harness-incomplete' (sub-plan-5 진행 중) | 'harness-complete' (sub-plan-5 종결 / 5 요소 보유) | 'harness-validated' (sub-plan-6 + ≥ 2 PoC corroboration / §8.1 strict 입증).
harness_status_meta.transitioned_by: DEC-2026-05-06-sub-plan-6-종결 + §8.1 strict 7/7 + ≥ 2 PoC corroboration (PoC #05 + PoC #03 retrofit)

transitions.scaffolding -> harness-complete: sub-plan-5 종결 (5 요소 모두 보유 입증) — ★ ★ ★ ACHIEVED 2026-05-06
transitions.harness-complete -> harness-validated: sub-plan-6 종결 (PoC #05 e2e cycle pass + §8.1 strict 7/7)

five_required_elements.name: Mechanical gate
five_required_elements.implementation_target: trio enforcement: state.blocked + cli exit 2 + PreToolUse permissionDecision=deny (gate-eval.js + hooks-bridge.js)

five_required_elements.name: 자동 전이 (skill auto-invoke)
five_required_elements.implementation_target: hooks/hooks.json UserPromptSubmit + PreToolUse (★ D21' suppressOutput=true / additionalContext 차단 문구)

harness_status_meta.simulation_risk_until_complete: ★ ★ ★ harness-complete 도달 — mechanical gate trio + D21' suppressOutput 으로 LLM 양심 의존 → 코드 enforcement 전환 완료. (sub-plan-6 의 PoC corroboration 으로 §8.1 strict 입증 잔존.)

applies_to: all chain stage 산출물 (json + md + mermaid)

release_eligibility.$comment: ★ F-SIM-011 (2026-05-18 v8.4.0): corroboration 강도(depth) 명시 — 권위 SLSA L1~L3 + CNCF graduation + OpenSSF Gold (F-015 Claim D / industry-aligned). ★ ★ ★ v8.14.0 (2026-05-23 / DEC-2026-05-23-fsim-005-corroboration-2-genuine): corroboration **type 3계층화** (Type 1 / Type 1.5 / Type 2) + fail_mode_distribution boolean 강제 — Senior REVISE-1 BLOCKER 흡수 paradigm 진화. dry_run_placeholder 는 corroboration count 제외 (F-SIM-005 fail_mode enum 정합 / Adzic SBE 10년 폐기 함정 직접 회피).

corroboration_depth_levels.L0_analysis_only: analysis stage 만 — release_eligibility corroboration 자격 ❌
corroboration_depth_levels.L1_chain_3_complete: chain 1~3 종결 (test-spec 산출 / 단 RED 강도 = 본 PoC 의 test_run_evidence.fail_mode 명시 의무)
corroboration_depth_levels.L2_chain_4_GREEN: chain 4 GREEN 도달 (impl-spec.test_pass_evidence.fail_count == 0 + 실 runner 실행)
corroboration_depth_levels.L3_full_traceability_green: L2 + traceability-matrix 100% green + critical AP 무누락 (F-SIM-001 ap-coverage lane pass)

corroboration_type_levels.$comment: ★ v8.14.0 신설 — Senior REVISE-1 BLOCKER 흡수 (research-fsim-005-corroboration-2.md §1.1) / paradigm 진화 / industry 권위 Waymo CarCraft+실도로 병렬 + Anthropic Bloom auto-eval + NIST/AISI 외부 eval + SWE-bench static/Live (격차 35~50%p)
corroboration_type_levels.Type_1_self_run: Claude self-run / same session / 외부 사용자 ❌ — Anthropic Bloom auto-eval 동형 / corroboration 자격 부분 (boolean ❌)
corroboration_type_levels.Type_1_5_user_dogfood: 본 user 가 별도 PoC 적용 / same plugin SSOT / 외부 사용자 ❌ — ★ Rust/GCC Stage 3 identity check 동형 / self-bootstrap proof 본격 / corroboration 자격 ✅ (boolean)
corroboration_type_levels.Type_2_external_user: 외부 사용자 / 외부 repo / 별도 Claude Code session — NIST/AISI 외부 pre-deployment eval 동형 / corroboration 자격 ✅ (boolean) / ★ deadline 없는 carry (OSS 채택 트리거 의존)

fail_mode_qualification.$comment: ★ v8.14.0 신설 — Senior REVISE-3 흡수 / Adzic SBE 함정 직접 회피 / chain-coverage-validator validateFailModeDistribution (7번째 export / warn-only)
fail_mode_qualification.$comment_excluded: dry_run_placeholder 가 1개라도 있으면 corroboration_qualified=false (boolean / 임계 ratio ❌). 30% 임계 ratchet = v+1 (≥ 2 PoC 실측 후 / §8.1 단일 PoC 함정 회피)

release_eligibility.self_consistency_note: ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ F-SIM-011 패러독스 진정 해소 (v8.14.0 / DEC-2026-05-23-fsim-005-corroboration-2-genuine): Type 분류 3계층화 paradigm 본격 진화 + fail_mode_qualification boolean 강제. v8.4.0 (2026-05-18) = PoC #14 Type 1 partial 달성 (Claude self-run / Python+pytest / 패러독스 부분 해소). v8.14.0 = PoC #05 Type 1.5 single arm 본격 (TypeScript+vitest / 본 user 별도 PoC 적용 / Rust/GCC Stage 3 identity check 동형 / self-bootstrap proof 부분 달성) + dry_run_placeholder=0 양측 입증 (Adzic SBE 10년 폐기 함정 직접 회피 / fail_mode_qualification.corroboration_qualified=true). ★ ★ paradigm 정합 정직 표기 (Senior REVISE-2 사실 검증 보강 / 2026-05-23 사용자 결단 옵션 α): Type 1.5 second arm = ★ carry (poc-02 source empty 발견 / poc-03+poc-04-mini chain 4 yellow / deadline 없음). Type 2 (외부 사용자 / 외부 repo) = ★ carry (deadline 없음 / OSS 채택 트리거 의존). 두 carry 모두 commit-block 회피 꼼수 ❌ paradigm 정합 = release-readiness 자기 enforcement 본격 입증대 (paradigm maturity signal). DEC-2026-05-17 §4.1.2 P1 commit-block (2026-06-01) 9일 전 이행 + paradigm 진화 동시 자산화. industry-aligned: Rust/GCC Stage 3 identity check + Waymo CarCraft+실도로 + Anthropic Bloom auto-eval + SWE-bench static/Live 격차 35~50%p.
